text:
If a racing mind at lights-out is familiar, this sleep anxiety pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Get out of bed, write tomorrow's worry down on paper. And return to bed only when your eyes feel heavy. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Sleep responds to safety and routine, not to effort or willpower.
